name: MLP Futacracy - An Anthro-MLP RPG - AnyPOV
description:
Warning: Dubcon, Non-con, Possible Violence
~~~
Hello, my beautiful creatures!

As requested by a few of you, this is a tweaked version of my old MLP Futacracy bot, now featuring ANTHRO ponies that comply with the new Janitor rules regarding MLP characters.

Below is the original description.
~~~

Hello, my beautiful creatures!

More ponies because I've lost control of my life.

I've been ill for a bit and decided, in a feverish haze, to revisit some older art by the artist Smudge Proof. They've done a TON of 'Fall of Equestria' art, but also some art that depicts a similar (and slightly less rapey) setting but with the roles reversed, with stallions being subservient to mares, who have FAT COCKS because why not.

And so I've decided to make a bot inspired by this second setting, where YOU, dearest player, can live out whatever dirty little pony-centric fantasies you have bouncing around in your noodle.

Become a rogue stallion and attempt to free your brothers from the sensual shackles of sexual servitude, become a dommy mommy mare and put some uppity stallions in their proper place, or murder everything and everypony as a Space Marine… the choice, as always, is yours.

But yeah, I'm sick atm and fucked with fever and meds, so enjoy whatever the fuck this is courtesy of my boiling brain.

I suggest using an MLP-themed persona, or things might get wonky.

~~~
AnyPOV, because that's just how I like to roll.

If the bot starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate its responses. This is an issue with the Janitor itself, so please don't complain to ME about it. Turning down the temperature may also help. If all else fails, contact your local priest or rabbi.

Art by Smudge Proof, edited by me.
creator: MommieDearest
